page_title: Askable | Participant App: Wallet Core Flows & Expectations
frame_description: The user is viewing the results of a user testing session on the Askable platform, specifically looking at a list of questions on the left and a summary of responses on the right.

description: The main content area updates to show the summary and individual responses for the selected question.
frame_description: The right-hand panel now displays a summary of responses for the question about seeing monthly/yearly earnings.

description: User clicks on the same question in the sidebar again.
interaction_target: Being able to easily see my monthly or yearly total Askable earnings is beneficial to me.
page_title: Askable | Participant App: Wallet Core Flows & Expectations

description: The main content area refreshes, displaying a bar chart of ratings and the list of individual responses.
frame_description: A bar chart showing the distribution of ratings (1-5) for the question appears above the individual response list.

description: User hovers over the 'Hide filter' icon in the Filters panel.
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the small 'x' icon next to the filter label in the right-hand panel.

description: User clicks the 'Hide filter' icon.
The Filters panel on the right is collapsed.
frame_description: The right-hand panel that previously showed filters is now empty or hidden.

description: User clicks the funnel icon to show the Filters panel again.
frame_description: The user clicks the filter icon in the top right of the results area.

description: The Filters panel reappears on the right side of the screen.
frame_description: The Filters panel is visible again on the right.

description: User clicks on the question 'What other apps do you use that have a wallet or balance you can withdraw from?' in the sidebar.
interaction_target: What other apps do you use that have a wallet or balance you can withdraw from?
page_title: Askable | Participant App: Wallet Core Flows & Expectations

description: The main content area updates to show the summary for the newly selected question.
frame_description: The summary text on the right updates to discuss various apps like PayPal, Shopback, and Attapoll.

description: User highlights the text 'cashback/rewards' in the summary section.
frame_description: The user is reading the AI-generated summary and selects a specific phrase with the cursor.

description: User highlights the text 'cashback/rewards' again in a different part of the summary.
User highlights the word 'apps' in the summary text.
User highlights the word 'apps' again.
User performs a subtle horizontal scroll within the results view.
frame_description: The content shifts slightly to the right.

description: User clicks on the 'Results' tab in the top navigation bar.
page_title: Askable | Participant App: Wallet Core Flows & Expectations

description: User clicks on the 'Build' tab in the top navigation bar.
The page navigates from the Results view to the Build view.
page_title: Askable | Participant App: Wallet Core Flows & Expectations
frame_description: The screen changes to show the survey builder interface, with question blocks and configuration options.
